name: @symbol_indexing
description: O(1) symbol lookup via inverted index and Aho-Corasick multi-pattern matching. Core search engine that powers grep, egrep, and instant results. Handles tokenization, file watching, and index updates.

name: @intent_capture
description: Hook-based event capture that monitors tool calls (Read, Grep, Bash, Edit). Records what developers do in real-time to enable behavioral learning and intent prediction. Stores session context and goal tracking.

name: @domain_learning
description: Semantic domain discovery via Haiku/Opus. Analyzes code patterns to identify high-level capability areas. Manages domain lifecycle including creation, enrichment with keywords, auto-tuning, and deprecation.

name: @intent_prediction
description: Anticipates which files developers will need next based on session history and semantic clustering. Uses behavioral patterns to prefetch context and reduce search time. Powers predictive ranking in search results.

name: @domain_enrichment
description: Lazy enrichment pipeline that adds keywords to existing domains. Processes domains in batches through Haiku to generate 7-10 keywords per term. Uses job queue for parallel processing and rebalancing.

name: @redis_backend
description: Redis-based storage layer for O(1) access to indexes, domains, terms, keywords, and session state. Handles caching, counter management, and cross-service data sharing. Supports both Docker and local deployments.

name: @cli_interface
description: Command-line interface built from modular shell scripts. Provides aoa grep, aoa domains, aoa intent, aoa jobs commands. Implements Unix-style flags and pipes for seamless integration with developer workflows.

name: @gateway_service
description: HTTP gateway that exposes aOa as REST API. Routes requests to indexer, learner, and status services. Handles request validation, response formatting, and service orchestration. Powers both CLI and plugin communication.

name: @job_queue_system
description: Asynchronous job processing for domain enrichment and learning tasks. Manages queue state (pending, active, complete). Enables parallel processing of 3-10 domains per batch. Powers `aoa jobs` commands.

name: @status_service
description: Real-time status line showing aOa health, token savings, context usage, and intent counts. Displays confidence level (gray/yellow/green). Provides `aoa health` diagnostics and service monitoring.

name: @hook_system
description: Claude Code hook plugins that trigger during tool calls without requiring API keys. Captures intent, predicts context, generates semantic tags. Enables zero-config learning by watching Claude's behavior.

name: @semantic_tagging
description: Automatic tag generation for code snippets based on domain semantics. Assigns @domain and #tag labels to search results. Enables semantic search and intent tracking without explicit user input.

name: @file_discovery
description: Tree-sitter based code parsing for 165+ languages. Extracts function/class names, outlines, and structure. Powers `aoa find`, `aoa locate`, and `aoa tree` commands for fast file navigation.

name: @domain_lifecycle
description: Management of domain state transitions: active, stale, deprecated. Tracks domain metrics (hits, creation date, source). Enables graduated retirement when learned domains replace seeded ones. Powers auto-tuning.

name: @orphan_tag_system
description: Captures unmatched semantic tags that don't belong to existing domains. Stores orphan tags for learning cycles. Informs discovery of new domains based on actual developer intent gaps.

name: @autotune_optimization
description: Math-based domain tuning that prunes noisy terms, merges overlapping domains, and adjusts confidence scores. Runs pure math without LLM for efficiency. Triggered after 100 intents or manually.

name: @docker_deployment
description: Multi-container and monolithic Docker setup. Maintains parity between docker-compose (gateway, index, status, proxy, redis) and single-container Dockerfile. Handles environment variables and service orchestration.

name: @context_window_management
description: Compression of learned context to fit within Claude's token budget. Semantic domains replace lengthy code reads. Tracks context usage percentage and provides compression metrics in status line.

name: @project_isolation
description: Per-project configuration and indexing. Each project maintains isolated domains, intent history, and search indexes. Enables safe multi-project usage without data pollution or interference.

name: @file_watching
description: Watchdog-based filesystem monitoring that detects code changes in real-time. Updates index incrementally to keep search results current. Supports both local and Docker environments.

name: @ranking_scoring
description: Multi-factor scoring system for search result ranking. Combines recency, frequency, semantic domain match, and behavioral patterns. Powers `aoa grep` result ordering and predictive prefetching.

name: @session_context
description: Tracks developer session state including recent files, current goal, tags used, and time-based patterns. Enables context-aware search suggestions and next-file predictions. Persists across tool calls.

name: @rebalance_keywords
description: Every-25-prompts keyword rebalancing that assigns gap keywords to best-fit existing terms. Uses character overlap heuristics to find optimal term assignments. Improves search coverage without Haiku calls.

name: @cli_build_system
description: Modular shell script compilation that generates final `cli/aoa` binary from `cli/src/*.sh` fragments. Combines header, constants, utilities, search, files, analytics, repos, intent, system, jobs, setup, help, main sections.

name: @project_structure_analysis
description: Directory clustering and file grouping for domain analysis. Groups files by two-level directories (e.g., 'services/gateway'). Powers parallel Haiku analysis in `aoa analyze` for initial setup.

name: @term_keyword_index
description: Bidirectional mapping between keywords and domain terms. Enables fast keyword->term->domain lookups during search. Supports incremental updates and rebalancing after learning cycles.

name: @skill_based_onboarding
description: Guided skill execution for project setup (/aoa-setup, /aoa-start). Provides user-friendly explanations, time estimates, and progress tracking. Spawns background learning without hooks or API keys.
